suite.name: Convites

test.name: CT01 — Emissão de Convite com Sucesso

kw.name: Abrir Tela De Cadastro De Convite
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3000/convites/novo # Ajuste para a URL local do projeto'.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.doc: Testa a criação de um convite válido com saldo disponível.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.103) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x00000001030aef88 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3190432 1 chromedriver 0x00000001030a7134 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3158092 2 chromedriver 0x0000000102b533a8 _RNvCs9NA52FrZ4pF_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 74080 3 chromedriver 0x0000000102b4b148 _RNvCs9NA52FrZ4pF_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 40704 4 chromedriver 0x0000000102b3e154 cxxbridge1$string$len + 4688 5 chromedriver 0x0000000102b3fb40 cxxbridge1$string$len + 11324 6 chromedriver 0x0000000102b3e5bc cxxbridge1$string$len + 5816 7 chromedriver 0x0000000102b3dda4 cxxbridge1$string$len + 3744 8 chromedriver 0x0000000102b3da90 cxxbridge1$strin... test.name: CT02 — Bloqueio por Falta de Saldo

kw.name: Abrir Tela De Cadastro De Convite
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3000/convites/novo # Ajuste para a URL local do projeto'.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.arg: limite máximo de convites deste mês

test.doc: Testa o bloqueio quando o usuário não possui mais saldo de convites.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.103) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x0000000100d52f88 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3190432 1 chromedriver 0x0000000100d4b134 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3158092 2 chromedriver 0x00000001007f73a8 _RNvCs9NA52FrZ4pF_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 74080 3 chromedriver 0x00000001007ef148 _RNvCs9NA52FrZ4pF_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 40704 4 chromedriver 0x00000001007e2154 cxxbridge1$string$len + 4688 5 chromedriver 0x00000001007e3b40 cxxbridge1$string$len + 11324 6 chromedriver 0x00000001007e25bc cxxbridge1$string$len + 5816 7 chromedriver 0x00000001007e1da4 cxxbridge1$string$len + 3744 8 chromedriver 0x00000001007e1a90 cxxbridge1$strin... test.name: CT03 — Bloqueio por Data no Passado

kw.name: Abrir Tela De Cadastro De Convite
Open Browser

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.arg: Não é possível emitir convites para datas passadas

test.doc: Testa a validação de erro ao inserir uma data retroativa.

suite.doc: Suite de Testes de UI: Emissão de Novos Convites
